executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Use email admin@chuwitfarm.com and password: password to login. After login you will land on the admin dashboard. For TC004 (create leave request): navigate to the leave section via sidebar menu, click create new leave request, select leave type, fill dates using YYYY-MM-DD format, enter reason, and submit. For TC005 (approve leave): navigate to leave approvals page via sidebar, find a pending leave request, and click approve.
